title: Gutter Calculator
shortDescription: Calculate gutter length, hangers, and downspouts needed for roof drainage.
metaTitle: Gutter Calculator - Estimate Gutters, Hangers & Downspouts
metaDescription: Use this gutter calculator to estimate gutter meters, hanger count, and downspouts based on roof eaves, edge count, spacing, and waste allowance.
intro: Quickly estimate the gutter system you need for a roof. Enter eave length, roof edge count, downspout spacing, hanger spacing, and waste percentage to get a practical material estimate.
overview: This gutter calculator helps you plan roof drainage materials before purchase or installation. It estimates total gutter length, the number of hangers, and the number of downspouts based on your roof dimensions and spacing rules. Add a waste margin to account for cuts, joins, and on-site adjustments.
howItWorks: Enter the eave length in meters.
Provide the number of roof edges to be fitted with gutters.
Set the downspout spacing in meters.
Add a waste percentage for extra material.
Review the estimated gutter meters, hangers, and downspouts.
useCases: Estimating materials for a new gutter installation.
Checking how many hangers are needed for a roof repair.
Planning downspout placement for residential or commercial roofs.
Ordering gutter parts with a proper waste allowance.

examples.title: Example calculation
examples.input: Eave length: 12 m, roof edges: 2, downspout spacing: 10 m, hanger spacing: 60 cm, waste: 10%
examples.output: Estimated gutter length, hangers, and downspouts for the roof.
examples.description: Use the result as a fast material estimate before buying components.

examples.title: Planning a roof drainage upgrade
examples.input: Measure each eave section separately and sum the total length before calculating.
examples.output: A clearer estimate for gutters and supports.
examples.description: Useful when replacing old gutters or expanding an existing system.

faq.question: How do I calculate gutter length?
faq.answer: Multiply the eave length by the number of roof edges, then add the chosen waste percentage.

faq.question: How are hangers estimated?
faq.answer: Divide the total gutter length by the hanger spacing and round up to the next whole hanger.

faq.question: How are downspouts estimated?
faq.answer: Divide the total gutter length by the downspout spacing and round up to get the required number of downspouts.

faq.question: Why add waste percentage?
faq.answer: Waste covers cuts, overlaps, corner fitting, and installation adjustments.

seo.title: Gutter Calculator
seo.description: Estimate gutter meters, hangers, and downspouts for roof drainage with a simple online calculator.
